listings.title: Apple Watch SE Series 44mm
listings.body: Watch is in excellent condition and comes with a new charger.

listings.title: Office Depot Desktop Calculator
listings.body: BLUE Office Depot calculator in new condition, model KS-500, battery and solar powered. If it was used 5 times, it's a lot. In original packaging. Some info about this calculator... •  The KS-500 offers 24 easy-to-use functions.  Includes tax calculations, brackets function and last digit erase. •  4-key memory for easy retrieval. •  Easy-to-read display includes 12 characters on 1 line.  Tilt head allows you to position the display to the best reading angle. •  Automatically shuts off when not in use to save battery power. •  Uses 1 round cell L1131 battery (included).  The KS-500 is a dual battery/solar powered calculator. •  8 1/8"H x 5 3/4"W x 1"thick. Selling for $15, Originally Sold for $35 + tx Cash Only Please, no Zelle or Venmo. Pick up in New Rochelle.NY

listings.title: Unbranded 6-ft Flexible Metal Cable for Drain-Clearing Spin Auger.
listings.body: Unbranded 6-ft Flexible Metal Cable for Drain-Clearing Spin Auger. Clean with no rust. The cable ties would indicate that this cable has never been used. The diameter of the coiled cable is 10 inches. Shipment via USPS Ground Advantage.

listings.title: *NEW Honeywell Air Cleaner FILTERS ONLY
listings.body: These are the pre / post filters used in an electronic air cleaner. Brand is Honeywell. They are NEW and undamaged. The Honeywell unit shows a picture of the installed item. The unit requires 2 of them and slide in on a track They have an aluminum frame and the filtering material is aluminum also. Measurements are 12 3/8 X 15 /78 X 3/8 Paid $47+tx Sell both for $15, Less than Half price and final price. Cash Only Please, no Zelle or Venmo. Pickup is in New Rochelle NY https://duraflowindustries.com/product/82/Replacement-Aluminum-Pre/Post-Filter--12-3/8-x-15-7/8-x-3/8---Compatible-with-Honeywell-Air-Cleaner-Models-F300E1019,-F300A1620,-F50F1073---(2-Pack)
